from datetime import datetime

storage_account = "navispowerbidatastorage2"
file_systems    = ["malta", "mict", "gpa"]

print(f"🔧 Daily Maintenance — {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}")
print("=" * 60)

for file_system in file_systems:
    silver_path = f"abfss://workinstruction@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/{file_system}/"
    
    # Check file count before
    before = spark.sql(f"DESCRIBE DETAIL delta.`{silver_path}`").collect()[0]["numFiles"]
    
    # Optimize
    spark.sql(f"OPTIMIZE delta.`{silver_path}`")
    
    # Check file count after
    after = spark.sql(f"DESCRIBE DETAIL delta.`{silver_path}`").collect()[0]["numFiles"]
    
    print(f"  ✅ {file_system.upper()}: {before} files → {after} files")

print("=" * 60)
print("✅ Daily maintenance complete!")
